title: SATC Multi Tool Triangle Sanding Pads 60 PCS 93 mm Detail Mouse Sander Pads Durable Dust-Free 6-Holes Electric Sander Sandpaper Hook and Loop 60/120/180/240/320/400 Grits
features: 【Universal Size】60 pieces mouse sander pads, 93 x 93 x 93 mm and 6 dust holes, which are suitable for effective dust extraction of 93mm hook-and-loop triangular sanding pads.
【Meet More Needs】10 pieces of each sanding paper of 60/120/180/240/320/400 grit, which are different from coarse, medium, fine, extra fine, meeting more your requirements.
【Durable Hook&Loop Design】The sanding pads with Velcro fastener are easy and quick to attach, practical and saving time. Strong sandpaper adhesion prevents the sanding plate from slipping.
【Strong Toughness】 Made of high-quality aluminium oxide abrasive that prevents premature wearing and clogging, this sandpaper is durable, anti-static and will not be torn despite grinding hard items.

【Excellent Results】 This sandpaper produces the most uniform and consistent results with Light force. Triangle sanding pads perfect for corners, edges and irregular shapes. Recommended for sanding, paint stripping, finishing when working with furniture such as cabinets, cupboards, chairs...
description: Product Description SATC DURABLE MULTI-GRIT MOUSE SANDPAPER Our sanding paper set provides you with the multi-grit sandpaper you need. The Durable Hook&Loop mouse sandpaper features a 6-hole dustless design that prevents premature wearing and clogging. Whether you're a homeowner who likes to indulge in the occasional do-it-yourself home improvement project or a professional contractor who uses power tools daily, the products of SATC are the ideal choice. High-quality aluminum oxide paper prevents premature wearing and clogging light force on the tool produces the most uniform and consistent results Used in metal and non-metal, wood, rubber, leather, plastic, stone, glass, and other materials grinding and polishing If you have any questions, we are here for you. HIGH TEAR RESISTANCE & EDGE STABILITY 6 STANDARD HOLES FOR DUST EXTRACTION DURABLE VELCRO DESIGN FOR STICKING WELL SATC 60pcs detail sanding sheet assortment contains 10 sheets of each grit: 60/120/180/240/320/400 grits for various workpiece sanding Specifications: Material: Aluminium oxide Color: Red Shape: Triangle Number of holes: 6 Grits: 60 120 180 240 320 400 grits Size: 93mm*93mm*93mm Pack: 60 PCS Excellent Results This sandpaper produces the most uniform and consistent results with Light force. Triangle sanding pads are perfect for corners, edges, and irregular shapes. Recommended for sanding, paint stripping, and finishing when working with furniture such as cabinets, cupboards, chairs... How to choose sanding grit? Grit is rated by number. The lower the grit number, the faster the removal rate. For a rough surface, look for a low grit number (60 to 100). For fine finishing, look for grit in the 120 to 240+ range. The grits of the sheet are printed on the paper backing for easy identification. Our P60 COARSE grit sandpaper can be used for 1st pass / aggressive removal on projects needing several layers removed P120 MEDIUM grit sandpaper can be used for paint/varnish removal, rust removal, and general material removal P180 FINE grit sandpaper can be used for final surface smoothing and initial between coats P240 VERY FINE grit sandpaper can be used after priming, staining, or sanding P320 EXTRA FINE grit sandpaper can be used between coats of sanding P400 SUPER FINE grit sandpaper can be used for the final finish
